mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_tb (report_id, board_id, reporter_id, reason) VALUES (report_seq.NEXTVAL, #{boardId}, #{reporterId}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT r.report_id, r.board_id, r.reporter_id, r.reason, r.status, r.reg_date, b.title AS board_title, b.member_id AS author_id, am.name AS author_name, rm.name AS reporter_name FROM report_tb r JOIN board_tb b ON r.board_id = b.board_id JOIN member_tb am ON b.member_id = am.member_id JOIN member_tb rm ON r.reporter_id = rm.member_id WHERE r.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY r.report_id DESC

SELECT r.report_id, r.board_id, r.reporter_id, r.reason, r.status, r.reg_date, b.title AS board_title, b.member_id AS author_id FROM report_tb r JOIN board_tb b ON r.board_id = b.board_id WHERE r.report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.update: UPDATE report_tb SET status = #{status} WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report_tb WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND reporter_id = #{reporterId} AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report_tb WHERE status = 'PENDING'
